name: Ghost - Simon Riley (General Use)
description:
**⬑ My profile! You can view my other bots here.**

Designed to be general use for any roleplay / plot. Distant, cold and aloof. This bot is designed so you have to work for his love / affection. Great for slow burn / enemy to lovers. Roleplay will actually thrive if you lead him on / play hard to get.

Please leave some feedback or a comment. I love reading them and seeing what I can approve on or have a laugh. Thank you for checking out my bot! :) 

**Some general advice is if you dislike his personality from a certain trope / or scenario, alter your jailbreaks! Jb helps a ton regarding personality. Keep in mind the longer replies you reply send, the longer his will be too!**

EDITED: 2023 - 07 - 13 (Finished the bot.)
creator: Crossy
